Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 184. The Eunuchs of Aššur-ila’i (ABL 0322)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

a-na LUGAL EN-ia

(1) To the king, my lord: your servant Adad-ibni. [Good health] to the king, my lord.

o 22

ARAD-⸢ka⸣ m⸢d⸣IM—ib-ni

o 33

[lu DI-mu] a-na LUGAL EN-ia

o 44

[ina UGU] LÚv.SAG-MEŠ-ni

(4) [As to] the eunuchs [of] the household of Aššur-ilai [about whom the king] wrote to me: "[Let them br]ing them here!" —

o 55

[ša] ⸢É⸣ maš-šur—DINGIR-a.a

o 66

[ša LUGAL] iš-pur-a-ni

o 77

[ma-a lu-bi]-lu-na-šu-nu

o 88

[mARAD]—⸢d⸣15 LÚv.KAŠ.LUL

(8) I have just sent to the palace with a kallapu messenger [a total of four] eunuchs: [Urda]-Issar, a cupbearer; Ṣilli-Šamaš, a confectioner; Bel-deni-amur, a cook; and [P]atamû, a eunuch.

o 99

mGIŠ.MI—dUTU LÚv.kar-ka-din

o 1010

mEN—de-ni—a-mur LÚv.MU

o 1111

[m]⸢pa⸣-ta-mu-u LÚv.SAG

o 1212

[PAB 04] LÚv.SAG-MEŠ-ni

Reverse
r 1r 1

⸢an-nu⸣-rig ina ŠU.⸢2⸣

r 22

LÚv.kal-lap—ši-bir-⸢tú⸣

r 33

ina É.GAL

r 44

ú-se-bi-la-šú-nu

r 55

LUGAL EN ⸢liš⸣-al-šú-nu

(r 5) Let the king my lord question them. They are subjects of the city of Til-Barsip.

r 66

LÚv.ARAD-MEŠ-ni

r 77

ša URU.DUL—bur-si-bi šu-nu

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334209/.
